"D:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\stability_test.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\stability_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\stability_test.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\stability_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o E:\CascadingPool\bin\stability_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,E:\CascadingPool\bin\libstability_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\stability_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
